nasb.text: And his lord, moved with anger, handed him over to the torturers until he should repay all that was owed him.

esv.text: And in anger his master delivered him to the jailers,until he should pay all his debt.

cnv.text: 於是主人大怒，把他送去服刑，等他把所欠的一切還清。

ccb.text: 王大怒，下令把他交给狱卒受刑，直到他还清全部的债务。

csbs.text: 主人就发怒，把他交给掌刑官，直到他能还清所欠的一切债。
